notes: 1.0.32: seamless device connection + display command hygiene + manual-plasma firmware fix. App now STAYS connected to the 4D display (verify waits out the panel's reboot-on-open instead of looping); sends the Plasma StandAlone display ONLY its native ASCII commands (no binary Genie noise), with settings paced and only-the-changed-field so its one-byte-per-loop parser isn't overrun; auto-navigates to Form 4 when the plasma station comes online; the Opta is the authoritative serial source so the display's 16-bit-wrapped -31024 no longer flashes over it. Firmware: manual Plasma Request now actually sends PLASMA_GO / PLASMA_STOP to the Tip Charger (previously it only lit the indicator LED).
